creator: jbozza@mindsites.com
text:
Update www/cherokee to latest version: 0.99.19

Removed Files:
-files/patch-cherokee-connection.c
-files/patch-cherokee-handler_cgi_base.c
-files/patch-cherokee-util.h

Updated MASTER_SITES to current working list.
Removed options no longer available (OPENSSL/GNUTLS choice)
Added additional options (GEOIP/FFMPEG knobs)
Added ability to use internal PCRE
Added ability to turn off ADMIN interface, removing python requirement
Rebuilt plist

Port tested on 7.2-STABLE (amd64 and i386), 7.1-RELEASE, 6.3-STABLE

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
